summary: Completed comprehensive testing of achievement notification redirect behavior feature. Backend systems healthy, deep-link navigation working correctly, but achievement highlighting visual effects not functioning properly.

ui_bugs.issue: Achievement highlight visual effects not working properly - no ring glow or scale animation applied to target achievement
ui_bugs.details: When navigating via deep link /profile?section=achievements&highlight=first_prediction, the target achievement is found and modal opens correctly, but the expected ring-2 glow and achievement-highlight CSS animation are not applied. Achievement shows normal blue border styling instead of highlighted ring effects.

passed_tests: Achievement APIs return proper data structure with achievement_id in notifications
Homepage renders correctly with no regressions
URL parameters cleaned after handling (no ?section=achievements remains in URL)
Profile page auto-opens achievements modal when section=achievements parameter present
Target achievement (first_prediction) correctly identified and located
View All button manually opens modal correctly
Normal profile page (no params) does NOT auto-open modal
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix achievement highlighting CSS/animation effects in ProfilePage.jsx. The isHighlighted prop is being set correctly but the visual highlight styles (ring-2, scale animation, achievement-highlight keyframes) are not being applied to the highlighted achievement. Check CSS classes and animation implementation in AchievementBadge component.

success_percentage.frontend: 85% - Core functionality working but highlight effects broken
